source.releaseCommitMessage: Corregir contraste del selector de ranking

releaseContents: Solid #fff7ef foreground for GLOBAL/TEMA ranking scope buttons in dark themes.
Removed whole-button opacity that reduced effective text contrast.
Aligned normal, hover, focus, active and selected foreground states.
Added deterministic WCAG AA contrast coverage for every named dark palette.
excludedLocalChanges: the connected-user ARIA test hunks in tests/run.mjs

backup.reason: The release changes only CSS and deterministic tests; it includes no schema, migration, environment or persistent-data mutation.

preDeployChecks.isolatedCommitQa: passed: 173 deterministic tests and 12 smoke tests
preDeployChecks.formatCheck: not clean: existing Prettier debt remains in styles.css and tests/run.mjs; no bulk formatting was applied
preDeployChecks.branchSync: main matched origin/main before the release commit

postDeployVerification.shell: 200 from the www domain and Render origin
postDeployVerification.bootstrap: 200 guest payload, Secure HttpOnly cookie, no session ID in response body
postDeployVerification.securityHeaders: HSTS and CSP present on shell, auth, robots and sitemap responses
postDeployVerification.deployedCss: solid ranking foreground present and obsolete opacity 0.82 absent
postDeployVerification.lightTheme: rgb(31, 26, 23) text on white with opacity 1

metrics.assessment: No stop condition observed. CPU stayed below the pre-deploy maximum and Render returned no error-level logs.

rollback.databaseCompatibility: No schema or data migration was included.
rollback.procedure: Redeploy the previous Render deploy or revert only commit 0ead5f52db24c5527cc4e0413db4c0dd459975a9 if a visual regression is reported.

unresolvedRisks: Lighthouse scores can vary between runs even though the measured contrast now exceeds 4.5:1.
Unrelated connected-user ARIA changes remain local and were intentionally excluded from this production release.
Repository-wide Prettier debt remains outside the scope of this release.
